name: Calculatrice de Pavés
seo_title: Calculatrice Pavés – Pièces, Gravier et Sable
seo_description: Calculez le nombre de pavés, gravier et sable nécessaires. Entrez les dimensions de la zone et la taille des pavés pour obtenir les quantités exactes avec chutes.
description: Calculateur 1118. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Calculateur 1118. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Paver area (20×20 cm): 0.04 m² per paver
mistakes: Skipping or under-sizing the gravel base — leads to settling and cracking
Not compacting the gravel and sand bedding layers properly
Using paver size in metres instead of centimetres
formula_display: Area = Length × Width; Pavers = ceil(area ÷ (paver_L × paver_W) × pattern_factor); Gravel = area × 0.15 × 1.8
